description: This is a test suite for the Modal component in a JavaScript UI library, testing modal behavior, events, and integration with jQuery.

classes.name: Modal
classes.description: A class representing the modal component, with methods for showing, hiding, disposing, and handling updates.

methods.name: constructor
methods.description: Initializes a new Modal instance with a DOM element or selector.

methods.name: toggle
methods.description: Toggles the visibility of the modal, handling scrollbar adjustments.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the modal, handling events, focus, and backdrop.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the modal, removing focus trap and backdrop.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Disposes of the modal instance, removing event listeners and cleaning up.

methods.name: handleUpdate
methods.description: Handles updates to the modal, such as adjusting dialog position.
